ogTitle: Isabella Plains vs Kaleen: Climate Safety

heading: Isabella Plains vs Kaleen — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Isabella Plains, Australian Capital Territory and Kaleen, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Isabella Plains has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Kaleen (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Isabella Plains or Kaleen safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Isabella Plains has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Kaleen scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Isabella Plains scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Kaleen scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Isabella Plains or Kaleen?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Isabella Plains has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
